detail: Step 12d direct-to-main log+ROADMAP commit was blocked by the Claude Code auto-mode classifier ('Git Push to Default Branch' / direct push to main bypasses PR review). The 3 PR merges (PR #124, #125, #126) already landed on origin/main via `gh pr merge --squash`; only the orchestrator's single log+ROADMAP summary commit is local-only and unpushed.
replay_instructions: From the main project repo on a clean `main` checked out at c4006bb (or rebased onto latest origin/main with log.jsonl append + ROADMAP.md edits preserved): `git push origin main`. If the classifier still blocks automated push, the user must push manually OR add a Bash permission rule allowing `git push origin main` for this repo. The merged content (PRs #124/#125/#126) is NOT at risk — it is already on origin/main; only the bookkeeping commit is deferred.
